title: How one verse before the phone changes the way you move all day
caption:
This is the simplest thing no one does.

Before the alarm notification. Before the group chat. Before the news. One verse. You don't need a devotional app, a streaks counter, or a guided plan. Just open the Word and read.

You're not being legalistic. You're deciding who you are before the world decides for you.

"Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path." — Psalm 119:105. It doesn't light the whole road. Just the next step. That's enough.

Tag a man who needs to start here.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #discipline #christianity #disciplineequalsfreedom #morningroutine
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
